summary: Business operations analyst experienced in documentation accuracy, control execution, data validation, workflow improvement, reporting, and cross-functional coordination across revenue operations, business systems, SaaS platforms, and analytics environments.

experiences.title: Revenue Operations, Governance & Controls Analyst
bullets: Used Microsoft Office and reporting inputs to translate V2MOM, PAM, QBR, cash-flow, compliance, and customer-experience priorities into governed revenue-operations roadmaps for leadership portfolio decisions.

Processed and audited transaction documentation and SOX ELC.8 controls through governance reviews, self-inspection, accurate reporting, proactive risk identification, and disciplined control execution.
Reconciled documented procedures with actual operations through interviews, sampling, data validation, control testing, and documentation reviews.
Coordinated overflow dependencies across 13 Finance, Revenue Operations, Systems, Sales Operations, M&A, Audit, and Customer Service teams, clarifying owners and accelerating AR execution.
Standardized net-new AOV reporting inputs and definitions to improve Credit and Collections decision accuracy.

Sequenced business units through discovery, audit review, solution design, implementation tracking, monitoring, and enablement planning to create a repeatable continuous-improvement rhythm across teams.

experiences.title: Revenue Strategy & Financial Analysis Analyst
bullets: Validated data-entry accuracy, system functionality, and platform reliability through structured test scripts and QA execution.
Audited product workflows and internal systems while aligning technology infrastructure and leadership priorities with evolving business needs to support scalable, tech-driven operating improvements.
Created property-data reports and visualizations that improved operating visibility for internal teams and clients.

experiences.title: Business Systems & Revenue Data Analyst
bullets: Maintained accurate client-facing SaaS operations by validating system data flows, calculations, and platform functionality.
Performed clerical-style system documentation by mapping process steps, identifying optimization opportunities, clarifying workflow charts, and improving execution consistency across internal teams.
Analyzed property data with SQL, improving customer-listing alignment and increasing retention by 22%.

experiences.title: Analytics, Automation & Operations Analyst
bullets: Trained delivery teams through requirements definition, roadmap ownership, sprint planning, and JIRA milestone tracking.
Simplified analytics-platform interactions for internal teams and external clients by reducing manual friction, automating repetitive steps, and improving the end-to-end user experience.
Improved client service by aligning platform usability, analytics outputs, and communications with user needs.
Managed scope, budget, resources, timelines, and delivery risks while negotiating executive priorities to balance business needs, technical feasibility, and available execution capacity.

experiences.title: BI, Data Quality & Systems Analyst
bullets: Performed documentation and reconciliation work by standardizing testing records, validation practices, defect reports, and quality controls.
Led ETL testing during migration to identify data inconsistencies, system defects, and migration risks, improving defect detection by 60% and strengthening release confidence.
Modernized QA operations using Azure DevOps, Tableau, Citrix, VB, and Compare to improve defect visibility.
Developed Tableau visualizations and root cause analysis for clients to clarify system issues, performance bottlenecks, quality trends, and targeted application improvement opportunities.
